calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Jew for petitioner Claire Nakamura (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Authorization to Continue Administration and 2nd Report of Status of Administration.

Mr. Jew reported that the estate was nearing completion. He stated that assets from the decedent's parents' trust had been received into the estate accounts and that an additional account had been identified and was in the process of being marshaled. He further reported that he anticipated filing a petition for final distribution.

The Court took the petition off calendar and set a new hearing for status on close of estate for March 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Continued To Nov-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 19, 2019 is admitted to probate. Claire Nakamura is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Continued To Sep-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-22-305865 Esate of Gary Takeoka and PTR-23-305940 In re the Gary Takeoka Revocable Trust.

Appearances: Christopher Jew appearing via zoom for Claire Nakumara (petitioner).
Melanie Emmons appearing via zoom for and with William Fong (guardian) and minor trust beneficiaries.
Suliman Khan appearing via zoom for omitted beneficiaries.

Discussion was held in regard to the settlement agreement, that Ms. Emmons stated it would be in the best interest of the beneficiaries to accept the settlement agreement. The Court instructs Mr. Khan to file a request for dismissal so that the court can hear Ms. Nakamura's Petition for Probate. Petition for approval of settlement agreement is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary and Petition to Reform Trust are continued to September 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Continued To Aug-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Jew appearing via zoom for Claire Nakumara (petitioner).
Leah Capranica appearing via zoom for Jay Dowke (objector).

The parties informed that the court that they settled the matter, that they will be filing a petition for approval of the settlement agreement next week, and that they have met and conferred on the probate matter. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, and the Petition to Reform Trust will be continued (date to be determined).

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

Both matters are continued to July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the understanding that they will then be continued to the hearing that is given to the petition for approval of the settlement agreement.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Jew appeared by zoom for Claire Nakamura (petitioner).
Port Parker appeared by zoom for contestants.

Counsel both agree that the summons issue can be handled by an acknowledgement and that the matter can be continued to an appropriate interval. The court made an observation that the main contest will be in the trust and suggested keeping the costs down in this matter. Mr. Jew stated that the estate is a taxable estate, and that they need to get an administrator appointed to deal with the individual tax returns and the 706/estate taxes. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to April 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
